name: kasulik-ai-plugins
description: AI plugins for small and medium businesses. 54 skills across tourism, marketing, sales, operations, strategy, and AI workflow coaching. All skills work as /slash-commands in Cowork. Built by Kasulik AI (kasulik.ai).

plugins.name: kasulik-tööruum
plugins.description: 9 skills: workspace setup, AI coaching, assistant creation, workflow recipes, weekly review, Excel analysis, and WordPress integration.

plugins.name: kasulik-turism
plugins.description: 9 skills for tourism businesses — strategy, marketing, sales, guest experience, analytics, seasonal planning, reviews, and customer journey.

plugins.name: kasulik-turundus-ja-müük
plugins.description: 24 skills for copywriting, SEO, email sequences, pricing, outreach, competitive intel, brand voice, and marketing context.

plugins.name: kasulik-tugi-ja-teenindus
plugins.description: 6 skills for customer communication, process documentation, knowledge base articles, and process optimization.

plugins.name: kasulik-strateegia-ja-juhtimine
plugins.description: 6 skills for reports, strategic plans, competitive analysis, financial statements, stakeholder communications, and internal communications.
